p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: (1) test_repo_python_syntax_check - Python syntax check via py_compile, (2) test_repo_ruff_check - Ruff linting (F401, F821), (3) test_repo_black_check - Black formatting check, (4) test_repo_codespell_check - Codespell spelling check. Discovered CI commands from .github/workflows/lint.yml and .pre-commit-config.yaml. All 4 new p2p tests pass on base commit.

validate.notes: Fixed judge.py to properly evaluate rubric rules for non-config files. The rubric was pointing to test files which the judge ignored. Added extract_all_hunks() and updated call_judge() to use all_hunks for non-config source paths. All 4 checks now pass: Docker build OK, NOP reward=0, Gold reward=1, Rubric ICR=1.0.
